arabic:
عن عمر بن أبى سلمة رضى الله عنهما قال‏:‏ قال لي رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم‏:‏‏
"‏سم الله وكل بيمينك، وكل مما يليك‏"‏.‏ ((متفق عليه))

english.narrator: 'Umar bin Abu Salamah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported:
english.text:
Messenger of Allah (ﷺ), said to me, "Mention Allah's Name (i.e., say Bismillah before starting eating), eat with your right hand, and eat from what is near you."

.

chapter.english: The Book About the Etiquette of Eating
